# Implementation Plan: Wishlist Desired Rolls & Equip-Ready Pins

**Branch**: `016-wishlist-equip-ready` | **Date**: 2026-07-10 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)

**Input**: Feature specification from `/specs/016-wishlist-equip-ready/spec.md` (domain slice 2)

**Note**: Generated by `/speckit-plan`. See `.specify/templates/plan-template.md` for workflow.

## Summary

Promote **desired rolls** (item + plugs, no ownership required) and **owned-instance pins** into first-class equip-ready behavior. Carry `instanceId` through live resolve and snapshots into `SlotClaim`. Compute **equip-ready** as a pure function over applied combat slots vs inventory. Expose pin statuses on resolved variant responses and **gate** equip/DIM entry points with `NOT_EQUIP_READY` until every applied slot has a non-stale pin. Stale = evaluate-on-read when instance missing. No Bungie write equip or DIM export payload in this slice.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5+, Next.js (App Router)

**Primary Dependencies**: Builds/sets/inventory stack — `resolveVariant`, `attachmentService`, set items, inventory repository, debug Builds/Sets pages

**Storage**: SQLite — reuse `set_items.instanceId` + `selectedPerks`; extend snapshot JSON to include `instanceId` (no new pin table)

**Testing**: vitest co-located; gate = `npm run gate`

**Target Platform**: Local Next.js; signed-in debug verification

**Project Type**: Full-stack Next.js — debug/API-first

**Performance Goals**: Equip-ready evaluate interactive (&lt;100ms typical for single variant + inventory id set)

**Constraints**: Composition (015) independent of equip-ready; no Bungie equip/DIM payload; combat slots only; soft guidance/artifacts/fashion/LLM out of scope

**Scale/Scope**: 4 user stories; touchpoints: snapshot/SlotClaim pin propagation, `equipReady.ts`, resolved + gate routes, BuildsDebugPage, tests/contracts

## Constitution Check

- I. Small Testable Increments: **PASS**. US1 wishlist save → US2 pin/status → US3 gates → US4 stale/re-pin.
- II. Test-First: **PASS** (plan). Failing tests for wishlist save, pin statuses, equip-ready, gates, stale evaluate — before impl.
- III. Green Commit Checkpoints: **PASS** (plan). Gate after each story in tasks.
- IV. Co-Located Tests: **PASS**. `equipReady.test.ts`, resolve/attachment/route tests adjacent.
- V. Validation-First: **PASS**. Instance ids validated against inventory at evaluate/gate; zod at boundaries.

**Post-design re-check**: **PASS**. Research resolved storage/API/stale/debug; no constitution violations.
